title: Luffy Enters the Mirror World
description: On pages 18–18, this part focuses on Judge, Unknown person #13 as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You didn't destroy their cloning systems, did you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course not! Those were what we were after, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: However, everything else is barely recognizable!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wahaha! That's how it should be! Those damn germa! They should curse their stars for having run afoul of us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What happened to the straw hats?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to be honest, we accidentally let them set off!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, they should be dealt with in a matter of time.

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 11 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
